tldr_zh: 軟銀巨資投法AI，輝達微軟聯手推AI PC，Meta傳開發AI吊墜。
tldr_en: SoftBank invests heavily in French AI, NVIDIA and Microsoft launch AI PCs, Meta reportedly develops AI pendant.

items.title_zh: 軟銀豪擲750億歐元投資法國AI基建，創歐洲最大規模
items.title_en: SoftBank Pledges €75 Billion for French AI Infrastructure, Europe's Largest Investment
items.summary_zh: 日本軟銀集團創辦人孫正義宣布，將在法國投資高達750億歐元，用於建設人工智慧基礎設施，其中450億歐元將在2031年前用於興建兩座AI資料中心。這項巨額投資旨在強化法國在AI領域的地位，並成為歐洲最大規模的AI基礎建設投資案。
items.summary_en: SoftBank founder Masayoshi Son announced a massive €75 billion investment in France for AI infrastructure, with €45 billion allocated by 2031 for two AI data centers. This significant commitment aims to bolster France's position in the AI sector and marks Europe's largest AI infrastructure investment.

items.title_zh: 輝達與微軟將於台北發表首款NVIDIA晶片Windows AI PC
items.title_en: NVIDIA and Microsoft to Unveil First Windows AI PCs Powered by NVIDIA Chips in Taipei
items.summary_zh: 據Axios報導，人工智慧晶片巨頭輝達與微軟預計下週在台北共同發表首批採用輝達晶片作為主處理器的Windows個人電腦。此舉標誌著AI PC市場的重大進展，預期將為消費者帶來更強大的AI運算能力。
items.summary_en: According to Axios, AI chip giant NVIDIA and Microsoft are set to unveil the first Windows personal computers powered by NVIDIA chips as their main processors next week in Taipei. This development signifies a major leap in the AI PC market, promising enhanced AI computing capabilities for consumers.

items.title_zh: Meta傳正開發AI智慧吊墜，押注AI硬體新領域
items.title_en: Meta Reportedly Developing an AI Smart Pendant, Betting on New AI Hardware
items.summary_zh: 據報導，Meta正積極開發一款AI智慧吊墜，顯示該公司在人工智慧硬體領域進行大膽投資。這項產品可能旨在將AI功能融入日常穿戴裝置，進一步拓展Meta在AI生態系統中的影響力。
items.summary_en: Meta is reportedly developing an AI-powered smart pendant, indicating the company's significant investment in AI hardware. This device could integrate AI functionalities into everyday wearables, further expanding Meta's influence in the AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Google 24/7 AI助理Gemini Spark實測，日常任務表現出色
items.title_en: Google's 24/7 AI Assistant Gemini Spark Proves Useful for Everyday Tasks
items.summary_zh: Google新推出的24/7 AI助理Gemini Spark在實際測試中表現出色，能有效自動化處理從收件箱摘要到當地活動規劃等日常任務。儘管其作為獨立產品的定位仍不明確，但其便利性已獲得肯定。
items.summary_en: Google's new 24/7 AI assistant, Gemini Spark, has proven effective in automating everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning. While its purpose as a standalone product remains unclear, its utility has been positively noted.

items.title_zh: GitHub Copilot新計費模式引發開發者不滿
items.title_en: GitHub Copilot's New Token-Based Billing Sparks Developer Frustration
items.summary_zh: 微軟旗下GitHub Copilot的人工智慧程式碼助手，其新的基於token的計費模式引發了開發者社群的廣泛不滿。許多開發者認為這項改變終結了Copilot的「黃金時代」，並對其成本效益產生疑慮。
items.summary_en: Microsoft's GitHub Copilot AI coding assistant has introduced a new token-based billing model, causing widespread consternation among the developer community. Many developers believe this change marks the end of Copilot's "golden age" and raises concerns about its cost-effectiveness.

items.title_zh: 微軟譴責研究員公開零時差漏洞，引發資安爭議
items.title_en: Microsoft Condemns Researcher for Publicly Disclosing Zero-Day Exploits, Sparking Security Debate
items.summary_zh: 微軟因處理零時差漏洞的方式面臨批評，一名研究人員Chaotic Eclipse（又名Nightmare Eclipse）因不滿通報流程，逕自公開多項漏洞。微軟譴責此舉未經協調，並威脅採取法律行動，引發資安界對漏洞揭露政策的討論。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is facing criticism for its handling of zero-day exploits after a researcher, Chaotic Eclipse (aka Nightmare Eclipse), publicly disclosed several vulnerabilities due to dissatisfaction with the reporting process. Microsoft condemned the uncoordinated disclosure and threatened legal action, sparking a debate within the cybersecurity community about vulnerability disclosure policies.

items.title_zh: 超過1700萬台設備的巨型殭屍網路遭瓦解
items.title_en: Massive Botnet of Over 17 Million Devices Dismantled
items.summary_zh: 一個由超過1700萬台設備組成的龐大殭屍網路已被成功瓦解，據報導該網路與一個位於俄羅斯的住宅代理網路有關。這次行動對全球網路安全是一大勝利，有效遏制了大規模網路犯罪活動。
items.summary_en: A massive botnet comprising over 17 million devices has been successfully dismantled, reportedly linked to a Russia-based residential proxy network. This operation marks a significant victory for global cybersecurity, curbing large-scale cybercriminal activities.

items.title_zh: 微軟永久授權離線產品功能遭降級，引發用戶不滿
items.title_en: Microsoft Degrades Functionality of Perpetually-Licensed Offline Products, Angering Users
items.summary_zh: 微軟被指控降低了其Mac版Office 2019和2021等永久授權離線產品的功能，將其轉換為僅供檢視模式。此舉引發了用戶的強烈不滿，認為微軟損害了消費者權益，並質疑其對離線軟體的承諾。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is accused of degrading the functionality of its perpetually-licensed offline products, such as Office 2019 and 2021 for Mac, converting them to view-only mode. This move has sparked strong user dissatisfaction, with critics arguing that Microsoft is undermining consumer rights and questioning its commitment to offline software.

items.title_zh: 美英澳AUKUS聯盟開發水下無人機技術，強化海防
items.title_en: US, UK, Australia's AUKUS Alliance to Develop Underwater Drone Technology, Boosting Naval Defense
items.summary_zh: 美國、英國和澳洲在AUKUS軍事安全夥伴關係下，將共同開發水下無人機技術，旨在保護海底電纜並增強海軍防禦能力。這項合作將提升三國在印太地區的戰略部署與海洋監控能力。
items.summary_en: Under the AUKUS military pact, the US, UK, and Australia will jointly develop underwater drone technology to protect undersea cables and enhance naval defense. This collaboration aims to bolster the three nations' strategic deployment and maritime surveillance capabilities in the Indo-Pacific region.

items.title_zh: 川普政府撤回綠卡新規，移民政策回歸個案審查
items.title_en: Trump Administration Withdraws Green Card Rule, Reverting to Case-by-Case Immigration Policy
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普政府已收回先前宣布的綠卡新規，該規定原要求非美國公民必須返回原籍國才能申請永久居留權。此舉意味著移民政策將回歸依個案情況處理，減輕了部分移民申請者的負擔。
items.summary_en: The Trump administration has withdrawn its previously announced green card rule, which required non-U.S. citizens seeking permanent residency to return to their home countries to apply. This reversal means immigration policies will revert to case-by-case processing, easing the burden on some immigration applicants.

items.title_zh: 美軍飛彈癱瘓駛向伊朗貨輪，違反封鎖遭制止
items.title_en: US Missile Disables Iran-Bound Cargo Ship for Breaching Blockade
items.summary_zh: 美國中央司令部宣布，美軍向一艘試圖駛往伊朗、懸掛甘比亞國旗的貨輪發射飛彈，擊中輪機艙使其失去動力。此舉旨在執行對伊朗的封鎖，阻止其獲取可能用於軍事目的的物資。
items.summary_en: The US Central Command announced that American forces fired a missile at a Gambia-flagged cargo ship attempting to sail to Iran, hitting its engine room and disabling it. This action was taken to enforce the blockade against Iran and prevent it from acquiring materials potentially used for military purposes.

items.title_zh: 中國車廠擴張墨西哥，美國加強邊境防堵力道
items.title_en: Chinese Automakers Expand in Mexico, US Bolsters Border Prevention Efforts
items.summary_zh: 中國汽車製造商近年來在墨西哥迅速擴張，其品牌車輛開始頻繁出現在美墨邊境城市，引發美國關注。美國正加大防堵力道，以應對中國車輛透過跨境流動進入美國市場的現象，這對美國汽車產業構成潛在挑戰。
items.summary_en: Chinese automakers have rapidly expanded in Mexico in recent years, with their brand vehicles increasingly appearing in US-Mexico border cities, drawing American attention. The US is intensifying efforts to prevent Chinese vehicles from entering its market through cross-border movement, posing a potential challenge to the American auto industry.
